name: Wagtail
description: Open-source Django CMS focused on flexibility and editor experience

description.value: Open-source Python CMS built on Django with StreamField flexible content blocks, powerful search, and intuitive editing experience

initial-release.comment: First launched in February 2014 by Torchbox

cms-type.comment: Traditional Django templates with optional headless API support

deployment-model.comment: Self-hosted open-source; no official managed service from Wagtail

database-support.comment: Supports all databases compatible with Django ORM

api-type.comment: Wagtail API v2 provides REST endpoints; Django Ninja integration available

multi-tenancy.comment: Supports managing multiple websites from a single installation

static-site-generation.comment: Can be used with static site generators via headless API

edge-deployment.comment: Self-hosted Django app; edge deployment requires separate CDN configuration

content-types.comment: Custom page models defined as Python classes extending Page

custom-fields.comment: Django model fields plus Wagtail-specific field types

field-types.comment: StreamField provides component/block-based content; snippets for reusable content

content-relationships.comment: Django ForeignKey, page chooser panels for linking content

nested-components.comment: StreamField allows nested blocks and StructBlocks for complex content structures

localization.comment: Wagtail Localize extension provides translation and multi-language support

content-validation.comment: Django model validation plus custom panel validators

embedded-interactives.comment: StreamField blocks can embed custom widgets and interactive components

content-versioning.comment: Page history with revision comparison and restore functionality

draft-publish.comment: Separate draft and live versions with status tracking

scheduled-publishing.comment: Go-live and expiry scheduling via management command

approval-workflows.comment: Configurable workflow chains with group approval tasks

content-locking.comment: Built-in content locking for editorial workflows

audit-logging.comment: Page history tracks all actions and users; customizable audit log system

image-transformations.comment: Renditions with resize, crop, fill rules, and focal point cropping

external-media-storage.comment: Django storage backends support S3 and other external storage

video-support.comment: wagtailmedia package provides video and audio support

svg-support.comment: SVG uploads supported via WAGTAILIMAGES_EXTENSIONS config

folder-organization.comment: Collections for organizing images and documents

granular-permissions.comment: Page-level permissions, collection permissions, site-specific permissions

sso-saml.comment: Via django packages: SAML 2.0, OAuth, LDAP, Azure AD integration

audience-restrictions.comment: Private pages accessible to specific user groups

typescript-sdk.comment: Third-party wagtail-js package available but not official

content-type-sdk.comment: Content types defined as Python classes (code-first by design)

cli-tools.comment: wagtail command plus Django management commands

local-development.comment: Full local development with Django development server

webhooks.comment: Django signals system; wagtail-hooks package for HTTP webhooks

plugin-system.comment: Hooks, ViewSets, custom panels, StreamField blocks, rich text extensions

admin-ui-customization.comment: Custom admin views, panels, form widgets, React components, Stimulus controllers

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent docs with tutorials, API reference, guides, and video resources

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official Next.js tutorial; works with any frontend via REST API

search-integration.comment: Built-in search with Elasticsearch and PostgreSQL full-text backends

preview-mode.comment: Live preview in admin; headless preview requires custom implementation

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; integrations via Django packages

ai-features.comment: wagtail-ai package: content generation, summaries, alt text, LLM integration

response-caching.comment: Django cache framework; template fragment caching

rate-limits.comment: No rate limits on self-hosted installation

global-regions.comment: Self-hosted; deploy to any region as needed

pricing-model.comment: No license fees; commercial support available from Torchbox and partners

commercial-support.comment: Torchbox and certified partners offer commercial support

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise features included in core: workflows, permissions, versioning, SSO via plugins
